description_long: This house is situated within a dense cluster of trees, giving it a secluded, suburban feel. The structure is rectangular with a flat roof and features a modern, minimalist design. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, possibly concrete or stucco, with large windows on multiple sides allowing for ample natural light. The property is accessed by a driveway that connects to a main road, and there is a small parking area in front of the house. The surrounding landscape is dominated by evenly spaced trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier from the road. The house is set back from the main road, emphasizing a sense of retreat and tranquility.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house surrounded by dense trees, featuring large windows and a driveway connecting to a main road.
description_view_0: The house is seen from above with the driveway and main road clearly visible, surrounded by a dense arrangement of trees.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear and side of the house, with the driveway extending from the main road and trees densely packed around the property.
description_view_2: The house is partially obscured by trees, with the main road and driveway visible, emphasizing the secluded nature of the property.
description_view_3: The front of the house and driveway are most visible, with the house nestled among trees and the main road running horizontally in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small paved area, no porch or columns, minimalistic modern entry.
